purpose: Define the current agent distribution pattern for canonical file-set launch from LightSpeed through Raphael.

nextLayer.role: future high-frequency stewardship and distribution layer
nextLayer.activation: requires automation slot or account limit change

futureSubagents.role: archive extraction and ZIP canonical-candidate review
version collapse and dashboard landing application
route proof packets and static interactive page elements
investor dashboards, Google Earth and spatial tailoring
asset placement and field-specific dashboard branding

zStackScaffold.rule: Do not activate Z stack operators until separately approved.

handoffRule: Every agent receives only its current queue, source authority, blockers, and next action. Shared state returns through OPEN_TASKS, task deltas, archive registers, dashboard configs, and package maps.
nextActions: Use Achilles prompts to execute Neo-prep until a new automation slot is available
Populate future subagent queues before activation
